title: 青葉賞の後に・過ぎる影は

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite her magnificent showing at the Aoba
Sho, Mejiro Ardan feels an indescribable
uneasiness akin to anxiety deep down inside...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The following day, Mejiro Ardan realizes that
Sakura Chiyono O and Yaeno Muteki will make
for formidable foes at the Japanese Derby.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Furthermore, she now understands that the source
of her anxiety lies with their recent rise to the
top.
